name: Replicate
description: Registers Replicate as a first-party model provider using the fixed Replicate HTTP Predictions API for text-generation models discovered from the upstream model catalog.

env.description: Fallback Replicate API token used for model discovery and prediction execution when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Replicate API token
settings.description: Replicate API token used for model discovery and prediction execution. Falls back to REPLICATE_API_TOKEN.

providers.name: Replicate
providers.description: Discovers prompt-based text-generation models from Replicate's /v1/models catalog and runs them through Replicate's model-scoped Predictions API.
